issue.title: Add Commit-Threshold Bug and Improvement Lumberjack Chops
issue.close_reason: Epic complete. All five phase beads closed. Bug-and-improvement audit lumberjack chops live in chezmoi (cfe7d7a3) and applied to ~/.config/sase/sase_athena.yml. Wrap-up validation via epic sase-2q (phases .1 static, .2 e2e, .3 apply/checks).

issue.title: Phase 1: Config Workflow Implementation
issue.close_reason: Phase 1 (Config Workflows) complete: workflows for audit_recent_bugs and audit_recent_improvements with threshold=50 + marker counting are committed in chezmoi cfe7d7a3 and applied. Validated by sase-2q.1.
issue.description: Add audit_recent_bugs and audit_recent_improvements workflows to the Athena config, including threshold gating, distinct markers, launched prompts with #pr, and marker updates after launch.

issue.title: Phase 2: Lumberjack Wiring
issue.close_reason: Phase 2 (Lumberjack Wiring) complete: code_quality lumberjack with sase_recent_bug_audit and sase_recent_improvement_audit chops (run_every: 60m) shipped in chezmoi cfe7d7a3. Validated by sase-2q.1.
issue.description: Add the code quality lumberjack/chops for the SASE repo, keeping existing refresh-docs chops unchanged and ensuring chop, workflow, and marker names remain distinct.

issue.title: Phase 3: Focused Static and Workflow Validation
issue.close_reason: Static & merged-config validation complete via wrap-up epic sase-2q (phase sase-2q.1 commit dec99bb6). Both workflows resolve, #pr xprompt visible, lumberjack/chops merged correctly, no chezmoi drift.
issue.description: Validate the config change with YAML parsing, xprompt explanations, merged axe config inspection, and git status checks without touching unrelated user edits.

issue.title: Phase 4: Extensive End-to-End Testing With Sonnet
issue.close_reason: End-to-end threshold & marker testing complete via wrap-up epic sase-2q (phase sase-2q.2 commit 609bc12f). All scenarios exercised; real markers under ~/.sase/projects/sase/ untouched.
issue.description: Exercise the workflows end to end in a disposable environment across first-run, below-threshold, threshold, stale-SHA fallback, independent-marker, prompt-content, and marker-update cases.

issue.title: Phase 5: Apply and Repository Checks
issue.close_reason: Apply & repository checks complete via wrap-up epic sase-2q (phase sase-2q.3): ~/.config/sase/sase_athena.yml byte-identical to managed chezmoi file; chezmoi 'just check' green except documented pre-existing pyvision tomllib failures (11 tests) — unrelated to this epic. SASE repo unchanged by this epic, just check skipped per plan.
issue.description: Run chezmoi checks, apply the managed config, run SASE repo checks only if SASE files changed later, and summarize changed files, commands, and residual risk.
